name: Standard Chartered Beyond Credit Card
exclusions: reserved for Priority and Private Banking clients with FUM qualification
fuel purchases do not earn reward points
duty-free cashback transactions do not earn reward points
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver subject to FUM qualification in the last 3 months prior to annual fee levy
additionalBenefits: 5 reward points per INR 150 on most categories
3 reward points per INR 150 on utility payments, supermarkets, insurance, property management, schools and government payments
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access
2 complimentary golf games or lessons every month

salaried: Priority or Private Banking relationship with FUM qualification of INR 50 lakhs and above
selfEmployed: Priority or Private Banking relationship with FUM qualification of INR 50 lakhs and above
